modules.name: emotes
modules.description: Standalone library for geting twitch, bttv, ffz and 7tv emotes. Translated from TypeScript original code by mattyHerzig. Utilizes Ryan 'teklynk' Jones's Twitch API Public Gateway

modules.name: ready
modules.description: Standalone library for signaling when modules ready up preloading.

modules.name: settings
modules.description: Standalone library for displaying, editing and saving overlay settings. Accompanied by stylesheet

modules.name: TMI.js
modules.description: Javascript library for the Twitch Messaging Interface
